content:
🔥 IxeRam | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Debugging and reverse engineering applications on Linux directly from the terminal, especially for performance-critical tasks or remote SSH environments.
✨ Key Features: • Advanced Memory Scanner (Int8/16/32/64, Float, Double, Strings, AOB, wildcards, multi-threaded, real-time tracking) • Static Pointer Discovery • Interactive Disassembler (x86-64, syntax highlighting, jump-to-address) • Live Patching (Keystone Engine) • Structure Dissector
📖 Summary: IxeRam is a high-performance, terminal-native memory scanner and debugger for Linux, offering a "Cheat Engine-like" experience. It focuses on speed, low overhead, and integration with tools like Ghidra, utilizing advanced techniques for direct memory access and live patching.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
